revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23989927232|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:千足古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|image=File:Senzoku Kofun, funkyu.jpg|coordinates={{Coord|34.670139|N|133.801778|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}} {{Japanese Ancient Kofun |Name = Senzoku Kofun |image = [[File:Senzoku Kofun, funkyu.jpg|280px]] |image Caption = Mound (front part to the left, rear circular part at the right rear) |Other Names = Zōzan No. 5 Kofun |Part of = Zōzan Kofun Cluster |Location = {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|en|Okayama Prefecture|qid=Q132936|lt=Okayama Prefecture|1=Okayama Prefecture}} {{ill|Okayama|en|Okayama|qid=Q200078|lt=Okayama|1=Okayama}} {{ill|北區|en|北區|qid=Q1180096|lt=Kita-ku, Okayama|1=北區}} Shinjōshimo |Latitude Degrees = 34 |Latitude Minutes = 40 |Latitude Seconds = 12.75 |Longitude Degrees = 133 |Longitude Minutes = 48 |Longitude Seconds = 6.25 |ISO = JP-33 |Shape = {{ill|Scallop-shaped Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|1=scallop-shaped kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop-shaped Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/scallop-shaped kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |Size = Total mound length: 81 m
Height (rear circular section): over 7.4 m |Burial Facility = Two {{ill|Yokoana-style Stone Chambers|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-style Stone Chambers|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} |burial goods = Bronze mirrors, beads, comma-shaped bronze objects, iron arrowheads, axes, swords, armor, {{ill|Haniwa|en|Haniwa|qid=Q849376|lt=Haniwa|1=Haniwa}} |Subsidiary Tomb = |Construction Period = Early {{ill|5th century|en|5th century|qid=Q8095|lt=5th century|1=5th century}} |Burial Figure = |Mausoleum Status = |Cultural Properties = National {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|qid=Q1081138|lt=Historic site of Japan|1=Historic site}}} under "Zōzan Kofun Nos. 1–6" |Special Notes = Single mound with two stone chambers
{{ill|Decorated kofun|en|Decorated kofun|qid=Q11626716|lt=Decorated kofun|1=Decorated kofun}} |Map = Japan Okayama |Icon = Scallop-shaped Kofun NNW.svg |Label = Senzoku Kofun |Label Position = top }} {{OSM Location map |coord = {{Coord|34|40|18|N|133|48|7|E|qq=}} |zoom = 15 |float = right |width = 250|height = 300 |caption = {{center|Distribution Map of the Zōzan Kofun Cluster|qq=}} |scalemark = 60 |mark-coord1 = {{Coord|34|40|25.63|N|133|48|13.35|E|qq=}} |label1 = {{ill|Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|en|Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|qid=Q11639745|lt=Tsukuriyama Kofun|1=Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)}} |label-pos1 = top |label-color1 = black |mark1 = 前方後円墳-南南西.svg |mark-size1 = 110 |mark-coord6 = {{Coord|34|40|12.75|N|133|48|6.25|E|qq=}} |label6 = '''Senzoku Kofun
(No. 5 Kofun)''' |label-pos6 = right |label-color6 = black |mark6 = Scallop-shaped Kofun NNW.svg |mark-size6 = 30 }} '''Senzoku Kofun''' (千足古墳, Zōzan No. 5 Kofun) is a {{ill|Scallop-shaped Kofun|ja|帆立貝形古墳|1=scallop-shaped kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Scallop-shaped Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/scallop-shaped kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} located in {{ill|Okayama|en|Okayama|qid=Q200078|lt=Okayama|1=Okayama}}, {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|en|Okayama Prefecture|qid=Q132936|lt=Okayama Prefecture|1=Okayama Prefecture}}. It is part of the Zōzan Kofun Cluster and designated a national {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|qid=Q1081138|lt=Historic site of Japan|1=Historic site}}} under the name "Zōzan Kofun Nos. 1–6." == Overview == The tumulus is located on a hill along the western bank of the {{ill|Ashimorigawa River|ja|足守川|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashimorigawa River|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 笹ヶ瀬川|1=Sasagase River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11602473}}, in the southern part of Okayama Prefecture. It lies in front of the main {{ill|Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|en|Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|qid=Q11639745|lt=Tsukuriyama Kofun|1=Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)}} and, along with five surrounding smaller kofun, forms a group of subsidiary tombs. These six tombs and Zōzan Kofun together constitute the Zōzan Kofun Cluster. The site was subjected to plundering in {{ill|1912|en|1912|qid=Q2077|lt=1912|1=1912}} (Meiji 45) and underwent archaeological surveys between 2010 and 2013. The mound is scallop-shaped, with a small front section (square) and a large rear circular section oriented northwest. The mound is three-tiered at the rear and single-tiered at the front. Cylindrical {{ill|Haniwa|en|Haniwa|qid=Q849376|lt=Haniwa|1=Haniwa}} (including morning glory-shaped variants) and various shaped Haniwa (such as quiver-shaped and shield-shaped types) were discovered on the mound. No {{ill|Fukiishi|en|Fukiishi|qid=Q11621213|lt=Fukiishi|1=Fukiishi}} stone coverings were identified. Two {{ill|Yokoana-style Stone Chambers|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-style Stone Chambers|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} are located in the rear circular section, both opening southeastward, though they are now sealed. The first chamber, the oldest in the region, features decorations and was constructed using stones from Kagawa Prefecture and Amakusa Sandstone from Kumamoto. Artifacts include comma-shaped bronze objects, beads, and mirrors. The tumulus is dated to the early {{ill|5th century|en|5th century|qid=Q8095|lt=5th century|1=5th century}}. == History == * 1912: Looting of Senzoku and {{ill|Sakakiyama Kofun|ja|榊山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakakiyama Kofun|qq=}} (No. 1 Kofun). Artifacts were temporarily transported to the Imperial Museum before being returned to the site. * 1921: Designated a national {{ill|Historic site|en|Historic site|qid=Q1081138|lt=Historic site of Japan|1=Historic site}}}. * 2010–2013: Excavations and restoration in preparation for public display. * 2023: Restoration completed, with public viewing available. == Artifacts == Artifacts discovered include: * {{ill|Bronze mirror|en|Bronze mirror|qid=Q1041984|lt=Bronze mirrors|1=Bronze mirror}} * Iron weapons and armor fragments * Beads made of glass and jasper * Cylindrical and shaped {{ill|Haniwa|en|Haniwa|qid=Q849376|lt=Haniwa|1=Haniwa}} == Related Facilities == * Okayama City Visitor Center for the Zōzan Kofun Cluster * Okayama City Archaeological Research Center == References == {{reflist|qq=}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|en|Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)|qid=Q11639745|lt=Tsukuriyama Kofun|1=Tsukuriyama Kofun (Okayama)}} * {{ill|Ojoka Kofun|lt=Ojoka Kofun|lt=Ojo Kofun|ja|おじょか古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ojo Kofun|qq=}} == External Links == * [https://www.city.okayama.jp/0000049488.html 千足古墳] - Okayama City Official Website {{Kofun navbar|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|千足古墳|version=101786852|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:千足古墳]] {{Commons category|Senzoku Kofun}} {{wikidata link|Q17995354}} [[Category:History of Kita-ku, Okayama]] [[Category:岡山県にある国指定の史跡]] [[Category:岡山県の古墳]] [[Category:Scallop Kofun]] [[Category:Decorated kofun]]
